cards.prompt: object o="hello": o is int, o as string, (int)o (try/catch) — три поведения?
cards.code: using System; object o = "hello"; bool isInt = o is int; string asStr = o as string; string castResult; try { int n = (int)o; castResult = n.ToString(); } catch (InvalidCastException) { castResult = "InvalidCastException"; } Console.WriteLine($"{isInt} {asStr} {castResult}");

cards.prompt: object iBoxed=42: iBoxed is int, iBoxed is long (is не делает numeric)?
cards.code: using System; object iBoxed = 42; Console.WriteLine($"{iBoxed is int} {iBoxed is long}");

cards.prompt: typeof exact vs is inheritance: d=new Dog(): ==typeof(Dog), ==typeof(Animal), is Animal?
cards.code: using System; class Animal {} class Dog : Animal {} object d = new Dog(); Console.WriteLine($"{d.GetType() == typeof(Dog)} {d.GetType() == typeof(Animal)} {d is Animal}");
